variables.headline: The month in numbers.
variables.summaryLine: Revenue and retention both hit record highs — here are the metrics that mattered.
variables.closingLine: Every north-star metric is trending up. Full breakdown in the shared workspace.
variables.disclaimer: Figures are unaudited internal estimates as of month-end.
